name: Color Picker from Image
description: Upload an image and pick any color. Get HEX, RGB, HSL codes. Extract color palettes from photos.
keywords: color picker from image, extract color from photo, image color picker, get hex from image, color palette from image
howToUse: 1. Upload any image 2. Click anywhere on image 3. Get HEX, RGB, HSL values 4. Extract color palette
faq: Q: What formats? A: JPG, PNG, WEBP. Q: Can I get palette? A: Yes, 6 dominant colors.
